timeguard.blurb: Icomply installs and services Timeguard time switches, immersion controllers, PIR lighting and RCD protection across Greater Manchester and the wider North West. Our NICEIC-aligned electricians commission new Timeguard circuits to BS 7671, issue certification, and keep commercial and residential stock running with planned maintenance. Trade timers, sockets and engineer spares are available from our North West shop for landlords, FM teams and contractors.
timeguard.seo_desc: Timeguard installation, BS 7671 certification & trade timers from Icomply. Service across Stockport, Manchester & the North West.

toa.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and maintains TOA intercom and public-address systems for schools, care sites, industrial premises and multi-block estates across the North West. We commission door stations and master desks to commercial intercom best practice, provide reactive call-outs, and supply certified spares so communication stays clear when it matters. Landlords and FM contractors can order trade TOA accessories from our Stockport-based shop.
toa.seo_desc: TOA intercom installation, service & trade spares with Icomply. Certified systems across Manchester, Stockport & the North West.

trox.blurb: Icomply commissions and services TROX smoke ventilation, AOV and air-handling equipment for high-rise residential and commercial buildings across Greater Manchester, Lancashire and Cheshire. Our engineers work to BS 9991 and EN 12101, complete certification packs for building control, and run planned AOV maintenance so dampers and actuators stay life-safety ready. Trade TROX control spares and actuator kits are stocked for North West contractors through our trade shop.
trox.seo_desc: TROX AOV & smoke-control install, BS 9991 certification & trade spares from Icomply across Manchester & the North West.

tunstall.blurb: Icomply installs, services and upgrades Tunstall nurse call and telecare systems for care homes, extra-care schemes and supported living across the North West. We follow HTM 08-03 guidance, provide staff training handover, and keep call points, pear leads and panels certified under planned maintenance. Care operators and FM teams can buy genuine-fit Tunstall trade spares from our North West shop with rapid engineer support.

uniview.blurb: Icomply designs and installs Uniview IP CCTV for retail parks, warehouses, housing schemes and commercial sites across Stockport, Manchester and the wider North West. Cameras and NVRs are commissioned to BS EN 62676 with remote viewing handover, and we provide reactive fault-finding plus planned camera cleans and firmware reviews. Trade Uniview mounts, PoE accessories and storage kits are available from our engineer shop for contractors on tight turnarounds.

urmet.blurb: Icomply supplies and installs Urmet door entry systems for multi-tenant residential blocks, student housing and mixed-use developments throughout the North West. From audio kits to video panels, we programme handsets, complete entrance commissioning and issue certification documentation for freeholders and managing agents. Planned service visits plus trade Urmet handsets, rain hoods and flush boxes keep estates secure and resident-friendly.

vaillant.blurb: Icomply’s Gas Safe engineers install, service and repair Vaillant boilers and system components for landlords, housing providers and commercial premises across Greater Manchester and the North West. Annual services include combustion analysis, safety certification and landlord gas safety records where required, with reactive call-outs for no-heat faults. Trade Vaillant service kits, seals and flue accessories are available from our North West trade counter for engineers on the road.

vanderbilt.blurb: Icomply installs and maintains Vanderbilt access control for offices, logistics hubs, education campuses and multi-site estates across the North West. Readers, controllers and credentials are commissioned to BS EN 50133 practice with audit-ready user databases and certification handover. We support planned maintenance, door force testing and trade supply of Vanderbilt readers, tokens and PSU spares through our Stockport trade shop.

ventilux.blurb: Icomply specialises in Ventilux AOV, smoke ventilation and emergency-related control systems for residential towers and commercial cores across Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire. Installation and service work is aligned to BS 9991 and EN 12101, with full certification for building safety cases and freeholder compliance packs. North West contractors can source Ventilux actuator kits, batteries and panel consumables from our trade shop for rapid turnaround jobs.

videx.blurb: Icomply is a trusted North West partner for Videx door entry — installing audio, video and GSM systems on apartment blocks, HMOs and commercial entrances from Stockport to Liverpool. We programme handsets, set up trade-friendly wiring standards and certify systems for managing agents and freeholders. Ongoing service contracts plus our trade shop for Videx handsets, panels and entrance accessories keep residents connected and doors secure.
